## Requirements

- Model download manifest with SHA256
- Integration tests","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-28T05:33:11.349682377Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-28T17:26:26.303937794Z","closed_at":"2026-01-28T17:26:26.303839552Z","close_reason":"Created reranker_registry.rs with 4 models (ms-marco baseline + 3 eligible: bge-reranker-v2, jina-reranker-turbo, jina-reranker-v2). Added model manifests with SHA256 placeholders. 14 integration tests in reranker_registry.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2rp1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-3olx","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-11T06:20:54Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq","title":"EPIC: Complete frankensearch migration -- reconcile all search primitives","description":"EPIC: Complete frankensearch migration -- reconcile all search primitives from cass into frankensearch.

CRITICAL CONTEXT UPDATE: frankensearch already has comprehensive implementations for most search primitives. This is NOT a simple "move code" migration -- it requires careful reconciliation of cass's SYNC implementations with frankensearch's ASYNC implementations.

KEY ARCHITECTURAL DIFFERENCE:
- frankensearch-core defines ASYNC traits (Embedder, Reranker, LexicalSearch) using SearchFuture and asupersync::Cx
- cass defines SYNC traits with direct Result returns
- Resolution: adopt frankensearch's async traits everywhere, create SyncEmbedderAdapter for sync implementations

EXISTING FRANKENSEARCH INFRASTRUCTURE:
- frankensearch-core: Embedder trait (ASYNC), Reranker trait (ASYNC), LexicalSearch trait (ASYNC), canonicalize.rs with Canonicalizer trait, ModelCategory, ModelTier
- frankensearch-embed: hash_embedder.rs, fastembed_embedder.rs, model2vec_embedder.rs, cached_embedder.rs, model_download.rs (43KB), model_manifest.rs (92KB), model_registry.rs (41KB), auto_detect.rs (80KB)
- frankensearch-fusion: searcher.rs (197KB!), blend.rs, adaptive.rs, rrf.rs, mmr.rs, and 15+ more fusion modules
- frankensearch-rerank: lib.rs (26KB), pipeline.rs (41KB)

WHAT GETS REMOVED FROM CASS (estimated ~5000+ lines):
- embedder.rs (trait definition)
- reranker.rs (trait definition)
- hash_embedder.rs (wrapper -- use frankensearch-embed directly)
- fastembed_embedder.rs (~400 lines)
- fastembed_reranker.rs (~300 lines)
- embedder_registry.rs (~150 lines)
- model_manager.rs (~654 lines, partial -- SemanticAvailability stays)
- model_download.rs (~1317 lines)
- two_tier_search.rs (~1238 lines)
- daemon_client.rs (~635 lines)
- canonicalize.rs (~900 of 1040 lines)
- Direct tantivy imports throughout query.rs

TASK ORDER (DAG):
Phase 0 - P0: Baseline capture (3r4jg)
Phase 1 - P1: Trait reconciliation: FS1 (Embedder), FS2 (Reranker), FS3 (canonicalize)
Phase 2 - P1: Implementation reconciliation: FS4 (fastembed embed), FS5 (registry), FS6 (fastembed rerank), FS7 (reranker registry), FS8 (model mgmt), FS13 (daemon client)
Phase 2.5: Integration test suite (uxwa2) -- validates frankensearch pipeline standalone
Phase 3 - P1: Consolidation: FS9 (TwoTierSearcher), FS10 (eliminate tantivy)
Phase 4 - P2: Cleanup: FS11 (remove migrated files), FS12 (final verification)","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:55:45.459869127Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-19T19:41:22.572546789Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["frankensearch","migration"]}
-{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.1","title":"FS: Reconcile cass SYNC Embedder with frankensearch-core ASYNC Embedder trait","description":"WHAT: Reconcile cass's SYNC Embedder trait (src/search/embedder.rs) with the EXISTING ASYNC Embedder trait in frankensearch-core (crates/frankensearch-core/src/traits.rs lines 124-213). DO NOT blindly move -- frankensearch already has a fully-designed trait.

CRITICAL DISCOVERY: frankensearch-core ALREADY defines:
  pub trait Embedder: Send + Sync {
      fn embed<'a>(&'a self, cx: &'a Cx, text: &'a str) -> SearchFuture<'a, Vec<f32>>;
      fn embed_batch<'a>(&'a self, cx: &'a Cx, texts: &'a [&'a str]) -> SearchFuture<'a, Vec<Vec<f32>>>;
      fn dimension(&self) -> usize;
      fn id(&self) -> &str;
      fn model_name(&self) -> &str;
      fn is_ready(&self) -> bool;
      fn is_semantic(&self) -> bool;
      fn category(&self) -> ModelCategory;
      fn tier(&self) -> ModelTier;
      fn supports_mrl(&self) -> bool;
      fn truncate_embedding(&self, embedding: &[f32], target_dim: usize) -> SearchResult<Vec<f32>>;
  }

vs cass's trait:
  pub trait Embedder: Send + Sync {
      fn embed(&self, text: &str) -> EmbedderResult<Vec<f32>>;  // SYNC, no Cx
      fn embed_batch(&self, texts: &[&str]) -> EmbedderResult<Vec<Vec<f32>>>;
      fn dimension(&self) -> usize;
      fn id(&self) -> &str;
      fn is_semantic(&self) -> bool;
  }

KEY DIFFERENCES:
1. ASYNC vs SYNC: frankensearch uses SearchFuture (boxed async), cass uses direct Result
2. Cx parameter: frankensearch passes asupersync::Cx for cancel-awareness, cass does not
3. Error types: SearchError vs EmbedderError
4. Extra methods: frankensearch has model_name(), is_ready(), category(), tier(), supports_mrl(), truncate_embedding()
5. Return types: SearchResult<T> vs EmbedderResult<T>

RECONCILIATION STRATEGY (recommended approach):
A. Adopt frankensearch-core's Embedder as the canonical trait everywhere
B. Create a SyncEmbedderAdapter in frankensearch-core that wraps any impl of the SYNC interface into the async trait: For hash embedder (pure computation): just Box::pin(async move { Ok(sync_result) }). For fastembed/model2vec (blocking ONNX): spawn_blocking + async wrapper
C. In cass, replace all uses of the local Embedder trait with frankensearch-core::Embedder
D. Cass's hash_embedder.rs currently wraps frankensearch::HashEmbedder and implements cass's SYNC Embedder -- after this change, it directly IS a frankensearch::Embedder, so the wrapper becomes unnecessary
E. Map EmbedderError variants to SearchError variants (Unavailable -> ModelNotReady, EmbeddingFailed -> EmbedFailed, etc.)

CASS EMBEDDER TYPES TO RETIRE:
- EmbedderError enum (map to SearchError)
- EmbedderResult type alias (use SearchResult)
- EmbedderInfo struct (use trait methods directly, or keep as cass-local display helper)
- EmbedderCapabilities (if any -- check for this)

HASH EMBEDDER WRAPPER (src/search/hash_embedder.rs):
This file wraps frankensearch::HashEmbedder to implement cass's SYNC Embedder. After this reconciliation:
- frankensearch-embed's hash_embedder.rs already implements frankensearch-core::Embedder
- cass's hash_embedder.rs wrapper becomes UNNECESSARY
- Delete cass's wrapper; use frankensearch-embed::HashEmbedder directly
- This is a net deletion of ~150 lines

STEPS:
1. Audit all cass files that reference the local Embedder trait: embedder.rs, hash_embedder.rs, fastembed_embedder.rs, embedder_registry.rs, two_tier_search.rs, daemon_client.rs, and all callers in lib.rs/indexer
2. List every EmbedderError variant used and map to SearchError equivalents
3. Create SyncEmbedderAdapter<T> in frankensearch-core (or frankensearch-embed) that implements async Embedder for any T: SyncEmbed
4. Update cass to depend on frankensearch-core's Embedder trait
5. Delete cass src/search/embedder.rs (trait definition -- the file goes away)
6. Delete cass src/search/hash_embedder.rs (wrapper -- use frankensearch-embed::HashEmbedder directly)
7. Update all imports throughout cass
8. cargo check + clippy + test in BOTH repos

TESTING:
- Verify hash embedder produces identical vectors via frankensearch-embed::HashEmbedder
- Verify embed() called from sync context still works (via adapter)
- Verify embed() called from async context works natively
- Error mapping: each EmbedderError variant maps correctly to SearchError
- All existing cass embedding tests pass with new trait

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- cass uses frankensearch-core::Embedder everywhere
- No local Embedder trait definition in cass
- Hash embedder wrapper deleted from cass (~150 lines removed)
- SyncEmbedderAdapter available for any remaining sync embedder impls
- All tests pass in both repos
- Error types properly mapped","status":"in_progress","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:56:21.471931528Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-19T20:14:55.150977334Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["embedder","frankensearch","migration"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:56:21.471931528Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-3r4jg","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:13:10.287837269Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

  pub trait Embedder: Send + Sync {

2. Cx parameter: frankensearch passes asupersync::Cx for cancel-awareness, cass does not
3. Error types: SearchError vs EmbedderError

B. Create a SyncEmbedderAdapter in frankensearch-core that wraps any impl of the SYNC interface into the async trait: For hash embedder (pure computation): just Box::pin(async move { Ok(sync_result) }). For fastembed/model2vec (blocking ONNX): spawn_blocking + async wrapper
C. In cass, replace all uses of the local Embedder trait with frankensearch-core::Embedder
D. Cass's hash_embedder.rs currently wraps frankensearch::HashEmbedder and implements cass's SYNC Embedder -- after this change, it directly IS a frankensearch::Embedder, so the wrapper becomes unnecessary
E. Map EmbedderError variants to SearchError variants (Unavailable -> ModelNotReady, EmbeddingFailed -> EmbedFailed, etc.)

CASS EMBEDDER TYPES TO RETIRE:
- EmbedderError enum (map to SearchError)
- EmbedderResult type alias (use SearchResult)
- EmbedderInfo struct (use trait methods directly, or keep as cass-local display helper)
- EmbedderCapabilities (if any -- check for this)

HASH EMBEDDER WRAPPER (src/search/hash_embedder.rs):
This file wraps frankensearch::HashEmbedder to implement cass's SYNC Embedder. After this reconciliation:
- frankensearch-embed's hash_embedder.rs already implements frankensearch-core::Embedder
- cass's hash_embedder.rs wrapper becomes UNNECESSARY
- Delete cass's wrapper; use frankensearch-embed::HashEmbedder directly
- This is a net deletion of ~150 lines

STEPS:
1. Audit all cass files that reference the local Embedder trait: embedder.rs, hash_embedder.rs, fastembed_embedder.rs, embedder_registry.rs, two_tier_search.rs, daemon_client.rs, and all callers in lib.rs/indexer
2. List every EmbedderError variant used and map to SearchError equivalents
3. Create SyncEmbedderAdapter<T> in frankensearch-core (or frankensearch-embed) that implements async Embedder for any T: SyncEmbed
4. Update cass to depend on frankensearch-core's Embedder trait
5. Delete cass src/search/embedder.rs (trait definition -- the file goes away)
6. Delete cass src/search/hash_embedder.rs (wrapper -- use frankensearch-embed::HashEmbedder directly)
7. Update all imports throughout cass
8. cargo check + clippy + test in BOTH repos

TESTING:
- Verify hash embedder produces identical vectors via frankensearch-embed::HashEmbedder
- Verify embed() called from sync context still works (via adapter)
- Verify embed() called from async context works natively
- Error mapping: each EmbedderError variant maps correctly to SearchError
- All existing cass embedding tests pass with new trait

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:

- No local Embedder trait definition in cass
- Hash embedder wrapper deleted from cass (~150 lines removed)
- SyncEmbedderAdapter available for any remaining sync embedder impls
- All tests pass in both repos
- Error types properly mapped","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:56:21.471931528Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-19T23:04:15.214848564Z","closed_at":"2026-02-19T23:04:15.214628301Z","close_reason":"Embedder trait reconciliation complete: cass embedder.rs re-exports SyncEmbed as Embedder + SearchError as EmbedderError from frankensearch-core. SyncEmbedderAdapter bridges to async Embedder trait. Hash embedder wrapper retained (adds cass-specific tokenization + fallback). All 3389 lib tests pass including 50+ embedder tests.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["embedder","frankensearch","migration"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:56:21.471931528Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.1","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-3r4jg","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:13:10.287837269Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.10","title":"FS: Eliminate all direct tantivy imports from cass","description":"WHAT: Remove all direct 'use tantivy::...' imports from cass. ALL tantivy interaction must go through frankensearch-lexical.

WHY: Cass currently imports tantivy directly in src/search/query.rs (lines 36-39): tantivy::{collector::TopDocs, query::{BooleanQuery,Occur,Query,TermQuery}, schema::{IndexRecordOption,Term,Value}, IndexReader, ReloadPolicy, Searcher, TantivyDocument}. This means cass owns the Searcher/Reader lifecycle and calls tantivy APIs directly, which defeats the purpose of having frankensearch-lexical as an abstraction layer.

CURRENT DIRECT TANTIVY USAGE IN CASS:
- query.rs: IndexReader creation, Searcher management, TopDocs collection, manual query construction
- lib.rs:8786: cass_open_search_reader() call (already via frankensearch)
- indexer/mod.rs:972: Schema validation (already via frankensearch)

WHAT NEEDS TO HAPPEN:
1. frankensearch-lexical must expose higher-level APIs that cass can use instead of raw tantivy
2. The Searcher/Reader lifecycle should be managed by frankensearch-lexical
3. Query execution should go through frankensearch-lexical (it already builds queries, but cass executes them directly)
4. TopDocs collection + document loading should be frankensearch-lexical methods

DEPENDS ON: All previous FS tasks should ideally be done first, but this can proceed in parallel if needed. The main dependency is that frankensearch-lexical needs to be enhanced to expose the missing APIs.

STEPS:
1. Catalog every direct tantivy import and usage in cass (query.rs is the main one)
2. For each usage, determine what frankensearch-lexical API is needed
3. Add missing APIs to frankensearch-lexical (search execution, reader management, etc.)
4. Replace direct tantivy calls in cass with frankensearch-lexical calls
5. Remove tantivy from cass Cargo.toml direct dependencies
6. cargo check to verify no tantivy imports remain
7. Verify all search functionality still works

CONSIDERATIONS:
- This is the task that completes the abstraction — after this, cass is fully decoupled from tantivy internals
- If tantivy ever gets replaced (e.g., with a custom engine), only frankensearch needs updating
- Some query.rs patterns may be hard to abstract (e.g., custom scoring, complex boolean queries) — frankensearch-lexical may need escape hatches
- The Searcher is currently shared across threads with Arc — frankensearch-lexical must support this pattern
- Reader reload (for live index updates) must be exposed

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- ZERO 'use tantivy::' statements in cass
- tantivy removed from cass Cargo.toml [dependencies] (only in frankensearch)
- All search functionality preserved
- No performance regression (Reader caching, Searcher sharing must work)","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:58:26.515975104Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-19T19:40:57.202143854Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["frankensearch","migration","tantivy"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.10","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:58:26.515975104Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.10","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:59:10.357440811Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.10","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-uxwa2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:40:57.202007679Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.11","title":"FS: Clean up cass src/search/ — remove migrated files, update mod.rs","description":"WHAT: Final cleanup of cass src/search/ after all frankensearch migrations are complete. Remove emptied files, update mod.rs re-exports, clean up query.rs imports.

WHY: After all previous FS tasks, many files in src/search/ should be either deleted or reduced to thin re-exports. This task consolidates and cleans up.

FILES TO POTENTIALLY REMOVE (after migration):
- src/search/embedder.rs (trait moved to frankensearch-core)
- src/search/embedder_registry.rs (moved to frankensearch-embed)
- src/search/fastembed_embedder.rs (moved to frankensearch-embed)
- src/search/reranker.rs (trait moved to frankensearch-core)
- src/search/reranker_registry.rs (moved to frankensearch-rerank)
- src/search/fastembed_reranker.rs (moved to frankensearch-rerank)
- src/search/two_tier_search.rs (consolidated into frankensearch-fusion)
- src/search/model_manager.rs (moved to frankensearch)
- src/search/model_download.rs (moved to frankensearch)
- src/search/canonicalize.rs (moved to frankensearch-core)

FILES THAT SHOULD REMAIN (cass-specific):
- src/search/query.rs (orchestration, caching, result formatting — but much slimmer)
- src/search/daemon_client.rs (daemon protocol is cass-specific)
- src/search/ann_index.rs (if it has cass-specific path management)
- src/search/mod.rs (re-exports)

DEPENDS ON: ALL previous FS tasks (1-10)

STEPS:
1. Verify each file has been fully migrated
2. Remove the migrated files (or reduce to re-export shims if needed for a transition period)
3. Update src/search/mod.rs to re-export from frankensearch instead of local modules
4. Update all imports throughout cass that referenced the old paths
5. Run cargo check + clippy + tests
6. Verify binary size hasn't increased (no accidental duplication)
7. Update AGENTS.md project structure if needed

CONSIDERATIONS:
- During transition, some re-exports may be needed for compatibility
- query.rs is the biggest file (~10K lines) — it should shrink significantly but won't be removed
- Check for any circular dependency issues between cass and frankensearch
- Run the full test suite including integration and e2e tests

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- src/search/ reduced by ~3000 lines
- All migrated files removed (not just emptied)
- All imports updated throughout cass
- cargo check + clippy + test passes
- No binary size regression","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:58:41.997945156Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-19T19:13:41.664307177Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["cleanup","frankensearch","migration"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.11","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:58:41.997945156Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.11","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:59:10.531280303Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.11","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.10","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:59:12.219935019Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.11","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.13","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:13:41.662180206Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.11","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:59:10.710898420Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.11","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.3","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:59:10.907498141Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.11","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:59:11.112321203Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.11","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.5","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:59:11.301873524Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.11","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.6","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:59:11.460817797Z","created_b  {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.12","title":"FS: Final verification — full test suite, benchmarks, binary size audit","description":"WHAT: Comprehensive verification that the frankensearch migration is complete and correct. Compare against pre-migration baseline from bead coding_agent_session_search-3r4jg.

DEPENDS ON: FS task 11 (cleanup complete)

VERIFICATION STEPS:

1. FRANKENSEARCH TESTS:
   cargo test --all-features in frankensearch (all crates)
   Every migrated module must have its own test coverage.

2. CASS TESTS:
   cargo test --all-features in cass
   Verify test count is >= baseline test count

3. CLIPPY + FMT:
   cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings in both repos
   cargo fmt --check in both repos

4. COMPARE WITH BASELINE (from .beads/migration_baseline/):
   - Binary size: must be within 5% of baseline (expect smaller due to less code)
   - Test count: must be >= baseline (migrated tests add to frankensearch count)
   - Benchmark latencies: must be within 15% of baseline for all benchmarks

5. SEARCH QUALITY REGRESSION:
   Run same 10 queries from baseline, compare:
   - Result counts must be identical
   - Top-3 result ordering must be identical
   - Score values within 0.01 tolerance

6. DAEMON INTEGRATION:
   - Verify daemon startup/shutdown still works
   - Verify TwoTierSearcher with daemon backend produces same results
   - Verify TwoTierSearcher without daemon (fast_only mode) works

7. UBS SCAN:
   ubs on all changed files in both repos — must exit 0

8. DETAILED LOGGING:
   All verification steps must produce timestamped logs with pass/fail status.
   Save to .beads/migration_baseline/fs_verification.log

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- All tests pass in both repos
- No clippy warnings
- Binary size within 5% of baseline
- Search quality metrics identical to baseline
- Benchmark latencies within 15% of baseline
- Clean ubs scan
- Verification log saved","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:58:55.524964354Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-19T19:40:57.502074945Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["frankensearch","migration","testing"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.12","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:58:55.524964354Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.12","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.11","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:59:12.395769185Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.12","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-uxwa2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:40:57.501972393Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.13","title":"FS: Move DaemonClient trait + fallback impls to frankensearch-core/fusion","description":"WHAT: Move DaemonClient trait + fallback implementations (src/search/daemon_client.rs, 635 lines) to frankensearch-fusion. The trait is the abstract interface for warm ML model inference via IPC.

WHY: The TwoTierSearcher (FS task 9) accepts Option<Arc<dyn DaemonClient>>. Without DaemonClient in frankensearch, TwoTierSearcher can't be consolidated there.

CURRENT CONTENTS (635 lines):
1. DaemonClient trait (8 methods): embed(), embed_batch(), rerank(), id(), is_available()
2. DaemonError enum: Unavailable, ConnectionFailed, Timeout, InvalidResponse, Internal
3. NoopDaemonClient: stub returning Unavailable (testing, no-daemon mode)
4. DaemonFallbackEmbedder: wraps daemon + local embedder with exponential backoff + jitter retry
5. DaemonFallbackReranker: same pattern for reranking
6. RetryConfig: max_attempts, base_delay, max_delay, jitter_pct
7. DaemonState: internal backoff timing state
8. 200+ lines of unit tests

IMPORTANT: After FS tasks 1 and 2 are done (Embedder/Reranker use frankensearch-core traits), DaemonFallbackEmbedder and DaemonFallbackReranker will reference frankensearch-core's Embedder/Reranker traits instead of cass's local versions. This is why FS1 + FS2 must be done first.

KEY INSIGHT: The DaemonClient trait is ABSTRACT -- no concrete transport. The trait defines embed/rerank methods. The actual Unix Domain Socket transport implementation is NOT in this file (it's in cass's daemon/core.rs). This makes it safe to move to frankensearch.

PLACEMENT:
- DaemonClient trait + DaemonError -> frankensearch-core/src/daemon.rs (alongside Embedder/Reranker traits)
- NoopDaemonClient -> frankensearch-fusion (test utility)
- DaemonFallbackEmbedder + DaemonFallbackReranker -> frankensearch-fusion (search orchestration)
- RetryConfig + DaemonState -> frankensearch-fusion

WHAT STAYS IN CASS:
- Concrete daemon server (src/daemon/core.rs)
- Concrete UDS transport implementation
- Daemon startup/shutdown lifecycle
- Daemon client connection logic

DEPENDS ON: FS tasks 1 and 2 (Embedder/Reranker trait reconciliation)

STEPS:
1. Read daemon_client.rs thoroughly
2. Move DaemonClient trait + DaemonError to frankensearch-core
3. Move NoopDaemonClient, fallback wrappers, RetryConfig to frankensearch-fusion
4. Move unit tests
5. Update cass imports
6. Verify TwoTierSearcher can reference the trait from frankensearch

TESTING:
- Port all 200+ lines of unit tests
- NoopDaemonClient behaves identically
- Retry/backoff logic preserved (exponential backoff with jitter)
- DaemonFallbackEmbedder: daemon up, daemon down, daemon flapping scenarios
- DaemonFallbackReranker: same scenarios

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- DaemonClient trait in frankensearch-core
- Fallback wrappers in frankensearch-fusion
- TwoTierSearcher (FS9) can use these types
- All unit tests pass in frankensearch
- Retry/backoff logic preserved exactly","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:11:50.013785110Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-19T19:39:17.915891032Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["daemon","frankensearch","migration"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.13","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:11:50.013785110Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.13","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:13:27.653488758Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.13","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:13:31.518660763Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.2","title":"FS: Reconcile cass SYNC Reranker with frankensearch-core ASYNC Reranker trait","description":"WHAT: Reconcile cass's SYNC Reranker trait (src/search/reranker.rs) with the EXISTING ASYNC Reranker trait in frankensearch-core (crates/frankensearch-core/src/traits.rs lines 309-339). DO NOT blindly move -- frankensearch already has a fully-designed trait.

CRITICAL DISCOVERY: frankensearch-core ALREADY defines:
  pub trait Reranker: Send + Sync {
      fn rerank<'a>(&'a self, cx: &'a Cx, query: &'a str, documents: &'a [RerankDocument]) -> SearchFuture<'a, Vec<RerankScore>>;
      fn id(&self) -> &str;
      fn model_name(&self) -> &str;
      fn max_length(&self) -> usize;  // default 512
      fn is_available(&self) -> bool;  // default true
  }

vs cass's trait:
  pub trait Reranker: Send + Sync {
      fn rerank(&self, query: &str, documents: &[&str]) -> RerankerResult<Vec<f32>>;  // SYNC
      fn id(&self) -> &str;
      fn is_available(&self) -> bool;
  }

KEY DIFFERENCES:
1. ASYNC vs SYNC: SearchFuture vs direct RerankerResult
2. Cx parameter: frankensearch passes asupersync::Cx, cass does not
3. Input type: RerankDocument (structured) vs &str (raw text)
4. Output type: Vec<RerankScore> (structured, includes original index + score) vs Vec<f32> (raw scores)
5. Error types: SearchError vs RerankerError
6. Extra methods: frankensearch has model_name(), max_length()

RECONCILIATION STRATEGY:
A. Adopt frankensearch-core::Reranker as the canonical trait
B. Create SyncRerankerAdapter that wraps sync rerank impls into async trait
C. At call sites in cass, convert &[&str] -> &[RerankDocument] (wrap text into RerankDocument structs)
D. At call sites in cass, convert Vec<RerankScore> -> Vec<f32> if needed (extract .score field)
E. Map RerankerError -> SearchError

CASS RERANKER TYPES TO RETIRE:
- RerankerError enum (map to SearchError::RerankFailed)
- RerankerResult type alias (use SearchResult)
- RerankerInfo struct (keep as cass-local display helper or replace with trait methods)

CALL SITE MIGRATION (need to check each):
- daemon_client.rs DaemonFallbackReranker: wraps Reranker + DaemonClient
- two_tier_search.rs: uses reranker for quality refinement
- lib.rs / indexer: anywhere reranking is invoked

STEPS:
1. Audit all cass files referencing local Reranker trait
2. Map RerankerError variants to SearchError equivalents
3. Create SyncRerankerAdapter in frankensearch-core (if needed)
4. Update cass call sites to use RerankDocument/RerankScore types
5. Delete cass src/search/reranker.rs
6. Update all imports
7. cargo check + clippy + test in BOTH repos

TESTING:
- Reranking produces identical ordering for same inputs
- RerankDocument/RerankScore conversion is correct
- Error mapping works for all variants
- All existing cass reranking tests pass

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- cass uses frankensearch-core::Reranker everywhere
- No local Reranker trait definition in cass
- RerankDocument/RerankScore types used at call sites
- All tests pass in both repos","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:56:31.485491474Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-19T22:04:15.212931306Z","closed_at":"2026-02-19T22:04:15.212907441Z","close_reason":"done","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["frankensearch","migration","reranker"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:56:31.485491474Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.2","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-3r4jg","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:13:11.544184229Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.3","title":"FS: Reconcile cass canonicalize.rs with existing frankensearch-core canonicalize.rs","description":"WHAT: Reconcile cass's canonicalize.rs (1040 lines, src/search/canonicalize.rs) with the EXISTING canonicalize.rs in frankensearch-core (crates/frankensearch-core/src/canonicalize.rs, 18KB).

CRITICAL DISCOVERY: frankensearch-core ALREADY has canonicalize.rs with a Canonicalizer trait:
  fn canonicalize(&self, text: &str) -> String;
  fn canonicalize_query(&self, query: &str) -> String;
  fn max_bytes(&self) -> usize;  // default 2000

This trait is already implemented with a DefaultCanonicalizer that handles markdown stripping, NFC normalization, whitespace collapsing, and char-boundary-safe truncation.

CASS's canonicalize.rs has (1040 lines):
- canonicalize_for_embedding(text) -> String (main entry point)
- canonicalize_for_embedding_legacy() (original impl)
- canonicalize_for_embedding_streaming() (optimized streaming variant)
- content_hash(text) -> [u8;32] via ring::digest SHA256
- content_hash_hex(text) -> String
- strip_markdown_and_code(), collapse_code_block() (keeps first 20 + last 10 lines)
- strip_markdown_line(), normalize_whitespace(), filter_low_signal()
- truncate_to_chars() (UTF-8 safe, MAX_EMBED_CHARS=2000)
- STREAMING_CANONICALIZE_ENABLED LazyLock (reads CASS_STREAMING_CANONICALIZE env var)

RECONCILIATION APPROACH:
1. Compare both implementations feature-by-feature:
   - Markdown stripping: which is more complete?
   - Code block handling: does frankensearch also collapse code blocks (head+tail)?
   - Content hashing: does frankensearch have content_hash()? (Probably not -- this may be cass-specific for deduplication)
   - Streaming vs legacy toggle: frankensearch likely doesn't have this
2. Merge any MISSING features from cass into frankensearch-core's canonicalize.rs
3. Key features to preserve from cass:
   - content_hash() / content_hash_hex() for deduplication (may stay in cass if truly app-specific)
   - Code block collapse with CODE_HEAD_LINES=20, CODE_TAIL_LINES=10
   - filter_low_signal() for removing noise tokens
   - The streaming variant if it offers measurable performance gains
4. Make cass use frankensearch-core::Canonicalizer trait
5. Config-based streaming toggle (no env var in library code)

WHAT STAYS IN CASS:
- content_hash() and content_hash_hex() are likely cass-specific (dedup via SQLite). These can stay as thin wrappers: canonicalize via frankensearch, then hash. This decouples canonicalization from hashing.
- The CASS_STREAMING_CANONICALIZE env var reading stays in cass; it passes the bool to frankensearch's config.

STEPS:
1. Read frankensearch-core/src/canonicalize.rs thoroughly (18KB)
2. Diff features: which operations exist in cass but not frankensearch, and vice versa
3. Add missing features to frankensearch (code block collapse, filter_low_signal, etc.)
4. Update Canonicalizer trait or DefaultCanonicalizer config if needed
5. In cass, replace canonicalize_for_embedding() with frankensearch::Canonicalizer::canonicalize()
6. Keep content_hash as thin cass wrapper: hash(canonicalize(text))
7. Delete most of cass's canonicalize.rs (~900 of 1040 lines)
8. cargo check + clippy + test in BOTH repos

TESTING:
- Golden-file tests: known input -> known canonicalized output (proves backward compatibility)
- Content hash backward compatibility: same input produces same SHA256 hash
- Streaming vs non-streaming: verify identical output
- Code block collapse: verify head+tail preservation
- Edge cases: empty input, pure whitespace, non-ASCII (CJK, emoji, RTL)

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- cass uses frankensearch-core Canonicalizer trait
- All canonicalization features preserved (markdown strip, code collapse, NFC, whitespace, truncation)
- content_hash() still produces same hashes (backward-compatible)
- ~900 lines removed from cass canonicalize.rs (only thin hash wrapper remains)
- All tests pass in both repos","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:56:42.289409279Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-19T22:54:10.784621337Z","closed_at":"2026-02-19T22:54:10.784587404Z","close_reason":"Ported cass canonicalization pipeline into frankensearch-core DefaultCanonicalizer (list markers, blockquotes, backticks, whitespace collapse, 15 low-signal patterns, char-count truncation). Cass canonicalize.rs reduced from 1040→262 lines (thin wrapper + hash functions). All 3389 lib tests + 86 equivalence tests + 32 frankensearch-core tests pass. Net 611 lines removed.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["frankensearch","migration"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:56:42.289409279Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.3","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-3r4jg","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T19:13:11.897488595Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
-{"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.4","title":"FS: Reconcile cass fastembed_embedder with existing frankensearch-embed fastembed_embedder","description":"WHAT: Reconcile cass's fastembed_embedder.rs (~400 lines) with the EXISTING fastembed_embedder.rs in frankensearch-embed (20KB, crates/frankensearch-embed/src/fastembed_embedder.rs).

CRITICAL DISCOVERY: frankensearch-embed ALREADY has fastembed_embedder.rs (20KB) that implements the frankensearch-core ASYNC Embedder trait. It likely already handles model loading, batch embedding, and dimension detection.

CASS has its own fastembed_embedder.rs (~400 lines) that implements cass's SYNC Embedder trait.

RECONCILIATION APPROACH:
1. Read BOTH implementations and diff feature-by-feature
2. Identify any cass-specific features NOT in frankensearch (e.g., specific model path detection logic, cass-specific env vars, error handling patterns)
3. Merge any missing features into frankensearch-embed's fastembed_embedder.rs
4. Once FS task 1 is done (Embedder trait reconciled), cass can use frankensearch-embed::FastembedEmbedder directly
5. Delete cass's fastembed_embedder.rs entirely

KEY CONSIDERATIONS:
- Model path: cass looks in ~/.local/share/coding-agent-search/. Frankensearch's version should accept configurable model paths (it probably already does).
- The fastembed crate pulls in ort (ONNX runtime) which is heavy -- both versions feature-gate this
- Batch size optimization: compare batch strategies between the two
- Error mapping: cass EmbedderError -> frankensearch SearchError (handled by FS task 1)

DEPENDS ON: FS task 1 (Embedder trait must be reconciled first -- cass needs to use the async trait before it can use frankensearch's async FastembedEmbedder)

STEPS:
1. Read frankensearch-embed/src/fastembed_embedder.rs (20KB) thoroughly
2. Read cass src/search/fastembed_embedder.rs (~400 lines) thoroughly
3. Diff: identify features in cass not in frankensearch
4. Add any missing features to frankensearch-embed
5. Delete cass's fastembed_embedder.rs
6. Update cass to import FastembedEmbedder from frankensearch-embed
7. Verify embedding outputs are bit-identical for same inputs
8. cargo check + clippy + test in BOTH repos

TESTING:
- Bit-identical embedding vectors for same input text
- Model loading from configurable path works
- Batch embedding produces same results as sequential
- Error handling: model not found, ONNX failure, empty input

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- cass uses frankensearch-embed::FastembedEmbedder directly
- cass's fastembed_embedder.rs deleted (~400 lines removed)
- No regression in embedding quality
- Model path is configurable
- All tests pass","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:56:57.040032659Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-19T19:37:28.666247394Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["embedder","frankensearch","migration"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:56:57.040032659Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.4","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:59:07.740493898Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}

 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.5","title":"FS: Reconcile cass EmbedderRegistry with existing frankensearch-embed model_registry + auto_detect","description":"WHAT: Reconcile cass's EmbedderRegistry (src/search/embedder_registry.rs, ~150 lines) with the EXISTING model_registry.rs (41KB) and auto_detect.rs (80KB) in frankensearch-embed.

CRITICAL DISCOVERY: frankensearch-embed ALREADY has:
- model_registry.rs (41KB): Registry of known embedding models with metadata
- auto_detect.rs (80KB): Auto-detection of installed models and best-available embedder selection

CASS has embedder_registry.rs (~150 lines) that:
- Probes for installed models in ~/.local/share/coding-agent-search/
- Checks CASS_SEMANTIC_EMBEDDER env var for override
- Returns the best available Embedder: hash (always) < model2vec < fastembed

RECONCILIATION APPROACH:
1. Read frankensearch-embed's model_registry.rs and auto_detect.rs to understand their selection logic
2. Compare with cass's simpler 150-line registry
3. Likely outcome: frankensearch's version is MORE comprehensive (it has 80KB of auto-detection!)
4. Cass just needs to configure frankensearch's registry with its model directory path and any env var overrides
5. Delete cass's embedder_registry.rs entirely

KEY CONSIDERATIONS:
- CASS_SEMANTIC_EMBEDDER env var: cass-specific override. Cass reads this and passes to frankensearch's registry config
- Model directory: ~/.local/share/coding-agent-search/models/. Passed as config to frankensearch
- Fallback chain: hash -> model2vec -> fastembed. Verify frankensearch preserves this ordering

DEPENDS ON: FS task 1 (Embedder trait) AND FS task 4 (FastEmbed embedder reconciliation)

STEPS:
1. Read frankensearch-embed auto_detect.rs and model_registry.rs
2. Compare selection logic with cass embedder_registry.rs
3. Configure frankensearch registry to accept cass's model directory
4. Cass reads CASS_SEMANTIC_EMBEDDER and maps to frankensearch config
5. Delete cass embedder_registry.rs (~150 lines)
6. Update all cass imports
7. cargo check + clippy + test in BOTH repos

TESTING:
- Same model directory -> same selected embedder
- CASS_SEMANTIC_EMBEDDER override still works
- Hash fallback when no ML models installed
- All existing registry tests pass

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:
- cass uses frankensearch-embed registry/auto-detection
- cass's embedder_registry.rs deleted (~150 lines removed)
- Model selection behavior unchanged
- All tests pass","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:57:08.851590322Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-19T19:37:51.723318907Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["embedder","frankensearch","migration"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:57:08.851590322Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:59:07.949439255Z","created_by":"ubuntu"},{"issue_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.5","depends_on_id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-02-19T18:59:08.159555193Z","created_by":"ubuntu"}]}
 {"id":"coding_agent_session_search-2s9fq.6","title":"FS: Reconcile cass fastembed_reranker with existing frankensearch-rerank","description":"WHAT: Reconcile cass's fastembed_reranker.rs (~300 lines) with the EXISTING reranking infrastructure in frankensearch-rerank (lib.rs 26KB + pipeline.rs 41KB).

- pipeline.rs (41KB): Reranking pipeline orchestration

CASS has fastembed_reranker.rs (~300 lines) implementing cass's SYNC Reranker trait for MS-MARCO-MiniLM-L-6-v2.

RECONCILIATION APPROACH:

2. If FastEmbed reranker already exists in frankensearch-rerank, cass just deletes its copy
3. If not, move cass's FastEmbed reranker impl to frankensearch-rerank, implementing the ASYNC Reranker trait from core
4. After FS task 2 (Reranker trait reconciled), cass uses frankensearch-rerank's implementation directly

DEPENDS ON: FS task 2 (Reranker trait must be reconciled first)

STEPS:

4. Determine if frankensearch already has FastEmbed reranker

6. If no: port cass's impl to frankensearch-rerank as feature-gated 'fastembed-reranker'
7. Delete cass fastembed_reranker.rs
8. cargo check + clippy + test in BOTH repos

TESTING:
- Reranking scores identical for same query+documents
- Model loading from configurable path
- Consistent API surface with FlashRank reranker

ACCEPTANCE CRITERIA:

- Implements frankensearch-core ASYNC Reranker trait
- cass imports from frankensearch-rerank
- cass's fastembed_reranker.rs deleted (~300 lines)
